Zurich Salon

A New Age
Beauty Experience

"Founded in 2022 by Denisa Salvel, Duality Beauty is a new age beauty salon with no gender concept, which allows you to be yourself!"

Located in the heart of Zürich, our salon offers a full range of beauty treatments in a warm, welcoming atmosphere. We believe everyone deserves to feel beautiful — on their own terms.

From precision nail artistry to expert waxing and lash treatments, every service is performed with care, attention to detail, and the finest professional products.

Find Us

The Founder

Meet Denisa

Denisa Salvel is the heart and soul behind Duality Beauty. With a passion for beauty and a belief that self-care knows no boundaries, she founded the salon in 2022 with a bold vision: a space free from gender norms where everyone feels at home.

Trained in the latest nail and beauty techniques, Denisa brings creativity, precision, and warmth to every appointment. Her philosophy — duality — reflects the balance of artistry and care, classic and modern, inner and outer beauty.

Book with Denisa
